title: Create: Sweets & Treats
description: Adds Delightful Treats For the Create Mod!
body:
# **BEFORE READING:**
Please be aware that this mod *Is* In Development!

I had originally made it in Mcreator(🤮) But I have since learned how to code and well now Create: S&T will be a Fabric Mod! 

## About Create Sweets And Treats


**Create: S&T** is a Create addon focused on adding (as the name implies) Sweets and Treats!

As the S&T (unpaid) intern, I'll be showing you some stuff in the mod!

1. **Rock Candy!** comes in multiple forms, Block, Chiseled, Polished, Bricks, And On a Stick!

2. **Chocolate Dough/Cookies**!!1! (Removed in later versions, this text is still here because the update hasn't been released, L)
 
3. **Brass Cake Pan** (it's the logo!!1!)

4. **Powdered Brownie** (*Also* Removed in later versions)

6. **Gunpowder Cake** is 99.987% safe! (probably)

**Important Note:** To access all the recipes included in Create: S&T, it is recommended to have Just Enough Items (JEI) installed. (The vanilla recipe book is cringe.)

## Development

Stay informed about supported versions and ongoing developments in the [dedicated Discord server!](https://discord.gg/kax7mjF7PU)
